problem id: c3ff737e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  01101101 -> 01101111
  11110110 -> 00011111
  00101010 -> 11011111
  10010101 -> 11101111
  00100101 -> 11101111
  01100001 -> 10101111
  01111011 -> 10001111
  01001101 -> 01101111
  10101010 -> 11011111
  11110001 -> 10101111

query: 10011010
predicted answer: 11011111
